summary: Comprehensive testing of Annual Subscribers feature completed. All 9 backend tests pass, all frontend features verified working.

tests.description: GET /api/admin/subscribers/download-template returns Excel file with correct headers
Test user Priya Sharma found with 6 EMIs and session data
/api/student/home returns financials with EMIs, package with sessions, programs list
POST /api/admin/subscribers/upload exists and validates file requirement

details: Tab visible in sidebar separate from 'Subscribers' (newsletter) tab
Header: 'Annual Subscribers' with subtitle 'Manage subscriber packages, EMIs, sessions & programs'
Template button works (downloads subscriber_template.xlsx)
Export button works (downloads subscribers_export.xlsx)
Upload section with file input and Upload button
Subscribers table shows: Name, Email, Program, Start, End, Total Fee, Mode, EMIs, Sessions, Remaining
Test user row shows: Priya Sharma, test@divineiris.com, Quad Layer Healing - Annual, INR 50,000, EMI mode, 2/6 EMIs, 5/14 Sessions
EMI Schedule section shows 6 EMIs with Due Date, Amount, Remaining, Status
EMI status badges: paid (green), due (red), pending (gray)
Sessions & Programs section with Carry Fwd (2), Current (12), Due (1)
Programs in Package: Quad Layer Healing, AWRP, SoulSync NeuroHarmonics, Trauma Clearing
Page title: 'Sacred Exchange' with subtitle 'Your financial journey & session tracking'
Top stats: Total Fee (INR 50,000), Paid (INR 18,000 green), Remaining (INR 32,000 red), Next Due (2026-05-27)
Payment Progress bar at 36% with '2/6 EMIs Paid'
EMI Schedule table with status indicators (paid, due, pending)
'Show All 6 EMIs' button for expandable list
Session Tracking ring chart showing 5 of 14
Session breakdown: Carry Forward (2), Current (12), Yet to Avail (9), Due (1 red)
Bi-Annual Download (2), Quarterly Releases (4)
Upcoming Scheduled Sessions: 2026-03-25, 2026-04-01, 2026-04-08
Programs in Package listed (confirmed via content check)
Soul Compass shows 36% JOURNEY (5/14 sessions completed) - correctly from subscription
Sacred Exchange card shows 'Quad Layer Healing - Annual' with '5 Used, 9 Left' and 'Paid' progress
Profile card shows Priya Sharma, Tier: Iris, Status: Verified
Sidebar shows 'Financials & EMI' navigation link

existing_admin_tabs.details: All existing tabs load correctly without issues

homepage.details: Divine Iris Healing homepage loads correctly

seed_data_creation: Test user Priya Sharma with subscription data (6 EMIs, 14 sessions, 4 programs) pre-created by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Annual Subscribers feature fully tested and working. Admin panel has separate 'Annual Subscribers' tab (distinct from newsletter 'Subscribers' tab). Student Financials page at /dashboard/financials shows comprehensive EMI and session tracking. Test data includes Priya Sharma with 6 EMIs (2 paid, 1 due, 3 pending), 14 sessions (5 availed), and 4 programs.
